meta.description: Lucid Commander robotics platform knowledge map

project.name: Lucid Commander
project.brand_promise: Delivering automated cleaning solutions that operate reliably in commercial environments without requiring specialized expertise to manage

descriptions.lucid-commander-desc: Robust robot management and control interface for commercial robotics operations with 1000 Window Washing Drones and Pressure Washing Rover
descriptions.fleet-dashboard-desc: Real-time fleet status map with device health indicators, active mission assignments, and maintenance alert prioritization
descriptions.teleoperation-desc: Real-time robot control over internet with live camera feed, telemetry overlay, and emergency intervention (<200ms latency)
descriptions.mission-control-desc: Click and Clean interface for waypoint-based mission planning with autonomous pathfinding and scheduling
descriptions.device-diagnostics-desc: Individual device analysis with mission history, component health monitoring, and predictive maintenance triggers
descriptions.business-intelligence-desc: Operational metrics including flight time analytics, mission completion rates, fleet utilization, and performance trends
descriptions.user-management-desc: Multi-role permission system with Owners, Operators, Teleoperators, Fleet Teleoperators, Customer Service, Operations Managers, and Executives
descriptions.real-time-telemetry-desc: Live position, altitude, battery status, environmental data, and mission progress with 5-10s freshness
descriptions.predictive-maintenance-desc: Edge-based component health analysis with maintenance alerts and automated scheduling recommendations
descriptions.natural-language-desc: Text-to-command processing and voice command integration for hands-free operation
descriptions.web-platform-desc: Primary interface with full feature set including Mission Control, Fleet Management, Advanced Diagnostics, and Business Intelligence
descriptions.mobile-platform-desc: Field operations interface with essential features: Robot Control, Mission Status, Device Health, Emergency Teleoperation, and Push Notifications
descriptions.aws-infrastructure-desc: Data and communication backbone using IoT Core, S3, Kinesis, Glue, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, and WebSocket connections
descriptions.telemetry-streaming-desc: WebSocket-based real-time telemetry streaming service with JSON format, gzip compression, supporting up to 1000 concurrent connections
descriptions.data-aggregation-desc: Apache Kafka-based real-time data aggregation pipeline with 5-second processing windows and 10k events/second throughput
descriptions.zone-assignment-desc: Constraint optimization algorithm for robot zone assignment with O(n²) complexity and <100ms response time
descriptions.conflict-resolution-desc: Spatial-temporal analysis engine for multi-robot conflict detection with priority-based routing and 30-second prediction horizon
descriptions.pathfinding-desc: A* pathfinding service with dynamic obstacle avoidance, 0.1m map resolution, and 1Hz replanning frequency
descriptions.ml-health-analysis-desc: Ensemble regression model for component health analysis using historical telemetry data with <50ms inference latency
descriptions.predictive-analytics-desc: 30-day forecasting engine with >85% accuracy for predictive analytics, updated daily
descriptions.nlp-engine-desc: Transformer-based natural language processing engine with >95% accuracy and <2s response time
descriptions.dark-theme-desc: Professional dark theme with rgba(18, 18, 20, 1) background optimized for extended operational use
descriptions.glass-morphism-desc: Glass overlay design system with backdrop blur effects for modern interface aesthetics
descriptions.status-indicators-desc: Color-coded status system using error red #FF0000, primary blue #0076FE, and secondary blue #33E2FF
descriptions.interactive-buttons-desc: White-based interactive elements with transparent overlays and border highlights for clear action feedback
descriptions.data-visualization-desc: Chart and graph components optimized for real-time telemetry and analytics display
descriptions.responsive-layout-desc: Mobile-first responsive design system with progressive web app capabilities

v1_monorepo_consolidation.objective: Integrate existing discrete systems into unified platform

v2_ai_enhanced_features.objective: Advanced AI capabilities and sophisticated analytics

v3_expert_teleoperation.objective: AI-assisted specialized interfaces for skilled teleoperators

user_access_matrix.description: Pre-computed user permission mappings for quick authorization checks

dependency_chains.description: Cached dependency analysis for impact assessment

feature_implementation_map.description: Mapping of features to implementing components and screens

scalability_analysis.description: System components affected by fleet size scaling

queries.detect_circular_dependencies: Complex graph traversal for dependency cycle detection
